---
title: "Download openme for Windows"
description-meta: "Download the openme Windows system-tray app — Windows 10+, x64 and arm64."
keywords: [openme Windows download, openme WPF app, openme Windows ZIP]
toc: false
css: download.css
---

{{< include _core.qmd >}}

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  renderHero("windows", false);
  renderAllPlatforms();
});
</script>
